name: fieldforge
description: Premium multitenant ERP for field services — US market

scripts.validate: npm run validate:config && npm run validate:docs && npm run validate:markdown
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/config/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/i18n/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/platform/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/sdk/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/marketing/tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/admin/tsconfig.typecheck.json --noEmit
scripts.start:e2e:web: npm run build --prefix apps/web && npm run start --prefix apps/web
